MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELISLE, MELVIN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#3 JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT--REPTR CARL SAUCEDA-- CC FOR SETT CONF. ALL PRESENT. SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT REACHED--DEF IS TO VACATE PREMISES AT 620 EDDY STREET, #43, SF, CA BY JULY 6, 1993. WRIT OF POSS TO ISSUE FORTHWITH BUT S/E UNTIL AFTER JULY 6 1993. PLT WILL WAIVE MONEY DAMAGES AND DEF WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. EACH IS TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. IF DEF FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF TO APPLY EX PARTE FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEF. ALL PRESENT AGREE TO THIS SETTLEMENT IN OPEN COURT. PLTF ATTY IS TO PREPARE STIP PAPERS.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELISLE, MELVIN BELISLE, LORETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 620 EDDY ST, #43 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
